default_system: You are a patient finance tutor for beginners. Be accurate, clear, and concise. Never give financial advice.
_comment: Contenders for the tutor model bench-off on the 5090 (32GB VRAM). Served one at a time by the llama-nemotron NSSM service on :8082 (only one ~20-27GB model fits at once). deploy/eval-models.sh drives them serially (download -> swap -> healthcheck -> bench -> restore Q5). Extra fields ctx/hf_url are read by the orchestrator; run.py ignores them. 'enabled' here only affects a direct `python run.py` (which races whatever is currently served on :8082).

models.note: PROD baseline + accuracy ceiling. Nemotron-3-Nano-Omni 30B/3B-active MoE reasoning, Q5_K_XL 27.2GB. Already on box. Full-offload VRAM ceiling on the 32GB 5090 (Q6_K_XL 31.3GB does NOT fit).
Same model, lower quant (Q4_K_XL 22.3GB). Already on box. The in-family speed/headroom comparison vs Q5.

Throughput pick. Qwen3.6-35B-A3B MoE (35B total / 3B active), Q5_K_XL 26.6GB. Verify exact filename against the repo tree before download (curl -I). Needs a llama.cpp build new enough for the Qwen3.6 hybrid (Gated DeltaNet) arch.
Faithfulness pick. Qwen3.6-27B dense, Q6_K 22.5GB. Dense models often hold the 'answer only from context' instruction tighter. Verify exact filename before download.
